creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I'm in the same boat. Can't use wifi on FreeBSD on my ThinkPad T14.

none4@pci0:3:0:0:	class=0x028000 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x14c3 device=0x7961 subvendor=0x17aa subdevice=0xe0bc
    vendor     = 'MEDIATEK Corp.'
    device     = 'MT7921 802.11ax PCI Express Wireless Network Adapter'
    class      = network

On Linux it works since 5.15 kernel, I am dual-booting this laptop with Linux Mint 21.1, it is supported there via iwlwifi.

I waited for 13.2 to see if there are any improvements but no luck so far. Keeping my fingers crossed for 14.0.
